## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Motivation

- What problem does this address?
- Why is this change useful for the project?

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] New rule or analysis logic
- [ ] CLI change
- [ ] Test / fixture addition
- [ ] CI / release process

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual verification performed
- [ ] Relevant docs updated

## Security / safety considerations

Describe any behavior that could affect transaction analysis, false positives, false negatives, or user trust.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, question, or test manually.
